$comment: REUSABLE PANEL SNIPPET (not a full dashboard). Drop this object into any dashboard's panels[] array and fix up `id` + `gridPos`. Cost-forecast panel: cumulative spend (mdk.run.cost_usd) + a linear projection extrapolated to period end + a budget line. Methodology: predict_linear over the last 7d window, projected 30d forward -- the standard 'at this rate you hit budget on day X' view. Tune the projection window and the $monthly_budget variable for your period. Keyed only to mdk.run.cost_usd (real #518 catalog metric). Styled with the Movate palette (theme/palette.json: forecast #F2A93B, budget breach #D64550). Identical to panel id 21 in mdk-exec-summary.json so the two never drift.
title: Spend forecast vs budget (end-of-period projection)
description: Cumulative spend (mdk.run.cost_usd) with a linear projection (predict_linear, 7d window -> 30d ahead) against the $monthly_budget line. Where the dashed amber projection crosses the red budget line is the projected breach date.
